title: Get an estimate for your project
description: Share the task, budget range and website goal. You will get a practical next step on structure, format and launch rather than a vague reply.
infoDescription: Short intake, clear estimate logic and a practical next step.
startTitle: What you get at the start
briefDescription: What needs to be built, for what kind of business and what the website should achieve.
briefBody: Share what needs to be built, what the business goal is and what budget range you are considering. That is enough to move from vague interest to a real plan.
advantages: A clear site plan before kickoff
A site prepared for SEO and ads

workMode.label: Engagement
workMode.value: Independent technical partner for commercial websites and digital products

workRhythm.label: Response rhythm
workRhythm.value: Reply within 24 hours with a practical next step
